Description: User can sign in with valid credentials and reach an authenticated session.
Acceptance Criteria: Valid credentials authenticate, token/session is created, protected account info becomes accessible.

Description: Invalid credentials are rejected without crash or silent success.
Acceptance Criteria: Wrong password or missing credentials return a validation/auth error and keep user unauthenticated.
Notes: Seeded from smoke and regression suites.

Description: Authenticated user can retrieve current account profile information.
Acceptance Criteria: Authenticated read path returns current account data without server error.

Description: Authorized user can browse organization list detail and info routes and APIs.
Acceptance Criteria: Organization list loads, detail can be resolved from a valid id, and info endpoints respond safely.

Description: User can open notifications and retrieve unread count or list.
Acceptance Criteria: Notification list and unread count endpoints render or respond without fatal errors.
Notes: End-user vs admin surfaces should be split later.

Description: User can access post list ids categories and recommendation content.
Acceptance Criteria: Posts list and supporting read endpoints return stable content for browse flows.
Notes: Detail and admin workflows should be separate rows later.

Description: User can browse news list and open detail by slug.
Acceptance Criteria: News list renders and a valid slug resolves to detail without fatal error.

Description: Admin dashboard shows user store and QR metrics without fatal errors.
Acceptance Criteria: Dashboard page and metric endpoints load safely for an authorized admin account.

Description: User can open store list and store detail without server errors.
Acceptance Criteria: Store listing and valid detail reads complete without fatal errors.

Description: Store verify endpoints behave safely for list detail and workflow actions.
Acceptance Criteria: Verification list/detail paths respond safely; business approval rules still need formal SRS import.
Notes: Current tests cover technical invariants more than business decisions.

Description: User can query search receive suggestions and access filter or hot-keyword endpoints.
Acceptance Criteria: Keyword search, suggestions, and filters respond successfully and support basic browse flows.

Description: System supports language selection and language CRUD or selection endpoints.
Acceptance Criteria: Formal requirement details not yet imported.
